title: Administrative Services Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate one or more administrative services of an organization, such as records and information management, mail distribution, and other office support services.

tasks.text: Prepare and review operational reports and schedules to ensure accuracy and efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Set goals and deadlines for the department.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze internal processes and recommend and implement procedural or policy changes to improve operations, such as supply changes or the disposal of records.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct classes to teach procedures to staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, administer, and control budgets for contracts, equipment, and supplies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Hire and terminate clerical and administrative personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct or coordinate the supportive services department of a business, agency, or organization.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate with and provide guidance for external vendors and service providers to ensure the organization, department, or work unit's business needs are met.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop operational standards and procedures for the work unit or department.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish work procedures or schedules to organize the daily work of administrative staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Learn to operate new office technologies as they are developed and implemented.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage paper or electronic filing systems by recording information, updating paperwork, or maintaining documents, such as attendance records or correspondence.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Meet with other departmental leaders to establish organizational goals, strategic plans, and objectives, as well as make decisions about personnel, resources, and space or equipment needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Oversee payroll functions, such as maintaining timekeeping information and processing and submitting payroll.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read through contracts, regulations, and procedural guidelines to ensure comprehension and compliance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Represent work unit at meetings or conferences and serve as liaison for requests or complaints.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise administrative staff and provide training and orientation to new staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
